messages.content: how to get the file name and extension from the url in java script. For example: https://d.dam.test.com/a/UyGSAon/test_how_to-V1.pdf?rc=10, the file name should be test_how_to-V1.pdf and the extension should be PDF.
the file name should include .pdf inside

make it more general for other urls. For example https://support.sap.com/en/alm/sap-cloud-alm/transformation/btc.html, e
https://support.sap.com/content/dam/SAAP/SAP_Activate/Change%20Network%20Training%20Plan_v1.0.pptx etc.
put url decode for the ouput
please remove the . in the extension
please make the code also compact with the url like https://me.sap.com/notes/2720477/E, in this case the extension should be htm and the file name should be 2720477
the extension output for https://me.sap.com/notes/2720477/E is not HTM, it's E,please fix this.
the extension output should be HTM.
please make the code to let all other urls can not detect extension to reture HTM instead
